description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser lingering metamagic rod 3,000 gp Lingering metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater lingering metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that linger for 1 round as though using the Lingering Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Lingering Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser lingering metamagic rod 1,500 gp Lingering metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater lingering metamagic rod 12,250 gp
